title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
